LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2010 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. JURY DEMANDED

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: COMPLAINT NOT TIME-BARRED ON ITS FACE. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENCE) AS AN ALTERNATIVE THEORY TO BREACH OF CONTRACT. (PLAINTIFF MAY AMEND THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION TO SHOW DEFENDANT HAD A DUTY TO PLAINTIFF INDEPENDENT OF THE CONTRACT IF HE CHOOSES.) DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (TORT OF ANOTHER). DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF CONTRACT.) PLAINTIFF MUST SHOW HE IS A MEMBER OF CLASS THE CONTRACT IS EXPLICITLY INTENDED TO BENEFIT AND THEREFORE A 3RD PARTY BENEFICIARY. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS SUGGESTING DEFENDANT'S AGENT HAD SCIENTER OR INTENT TO DECEIVE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Steven C. Finley of Hennefer Finley & Wood, LLP (296.0111) for plaintiff and responding party; Heather B. Hoesterey of Reed Smith LLP (659.5958) for defendant and moving party.

The court ruled as follows: Plaintiff's objections to defendant's evidence is sustained as to objections 1 and 4, and overruled as to objections 2 and 3. Defendant's objection to plaintiff's evidence is overruled. The motion was argued and the court took the matter under submission. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Defendant Bank Of America'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Steve Finley of Finley & Deaton (296.0111) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; Cathleen Donohoe of Reed Smith (650.352.0516) appearing for defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Complaint not time-barred on its face. Demurrer overruled as to 1st cause of action (negligence) as an alternative theory to breach of contract. (Plaintiff may amend the first cause of action to show defendant had a duty to plaintiff independent of the contract if he chooses.) Demurrer overruled as to 4th cause of action (tort of another). Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action (breach of contract.) Plaintiff must show he is a member of class the contract is explicitly intended to benefit and therefore a 3rd party beneficiary. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 3rd cause of action (fraud) for plaintiff to plead facts suggesting defendant's agent had scienter or intent to deceive. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
